result.stdout:
Description:
  Will summarize the health of provided stocks.

Usage:
  Solurum.StaelTradeBot [options]

Options:
  --inputStockInfo <inputStockInfo> (REQUIRED)    Text file that contains what stocks to research and any initial data you want to share to the LLM.
  --llmServiceToken <llmServiceToken> (REQUIRED)  The token to use to connect to the LLM service. Currently only works with ChatGPT
  --result-folder <result-folder> (REQUIRED)      The path to a folder that will contain results. Warning, existing content will be overwritten.
  --emailServiceToken <emailServiceToken>         The token to use to send emails. If not provided, no email will be sent. Currently only works with Brevo.
  --brevoToEmail <brevoToEmail>                   Brevo recipient email address (required when --emailServiceToken is provided).
  --brevoToName <brevoToName>                     Brevo recipient display name (optional). Defaults to 'Recipient'.
  --version                                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information
